Video.summary: Dive into the fundamentals of yoga with this sequence that builds up to downward facing dog.
Video.title: Practice Downward Facing Dog

Image.alt: Practice Downward Facing Dog
Practice Downward Facing Dog
Practice Downward Facing Dog

Video.summary: Eighteen Giants take on the first fire walk ever created on the Galapagos Islands, and tensions arise as they learn about trusting each other and themselves.
Video.title: Ecuador Part 1

Image.alt: Ecuador Part 1
Ecuador Part 1
Ecuador Part 1

Video.summary: Fears surface to reveal hidden abuse when Giants take the stage at the International University of Quito for INSPIRE Mic to empower students and staff.
Video.title: Ecuador Part 2

Image.alt: Ecuador Part 2
Ecuador Part 2
Ecuador Part 2

Video.summary: Entering the Amazon, the Giants bring clean water solutions that last ten years, and train indigenous leaders from eleven villages.
Video.title: Ecuador Part 3

Image.alt: Ecuador Part 3
Ecuador Part 3
Ecuador Part 3

Video.summary: Sherianna shares how to effectively use mantras and how they can positively influence your thinking and raise your vibration to match your desires.
Video.title: Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle

Image.alt: Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle
Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle
Mantras Made Easy With Sherianna Boyle

Video.summary: Grief is the death of something—someone, a relationship, a job, or a dream. There’s no timeline, and you cannot heal what you do not feel. Guided by David Kessler, this course helps you navigate your river of grief, honor your unique process, and find a path toward healing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 1

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 1
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 1
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 1

Video.summary: Grief is about the heart, but the mind shapes the story we tell. While you can’t change the facts of loss, you can change the narrative, honor old wounds, and choose words that guide you toward growth, meaning, and deeper connection to joy and healing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 2

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 2
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 2
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 2

Video.summary: Loss can make you feel powerless, but grief is your work and your power. David Kessler guides you to grieve fully on your terms, honor your unique process, and reclaim agency over your healing, showing that you can live fully while holding your pain with strength.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 3

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 3
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 3
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 3

Video.summary: Your survival mind is wired to protect you from pain, but after loss it can spiral into worry and worst-case thinking. Learn the science of grief, how repetitive thoughts form deep mental pathways, and how to rewire your mind to heal and grow.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 4

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 4
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 4
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 4

Video.summary: Want to keep the fires burning even when you’re too tired? Got questions about how long ED medications last? We break it down on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning
Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning
Sex Talk - Keeping the Sexual Fires Burning

Video.summary: Keeping it sexy between the sheets is possible even without the big “O” and a man wonders if he can get intimate post-heart attack. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm
Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm
Sex Talk - Hot Sex Even Without Orgasm

Video.summary: Watch the Rico No Suave Talk Show with Juan Antonio Cevllaos as he talks about his awesome acting career and also giving Rico a shoutout for his 5 year Anniversary.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Juan Antonio Cevallos

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Juan Antonio Cevallos
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Juan Antonio Cevallos
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Juan Antonio Cevallos

Video.summary: The Hyped Actor Harold Dennis, Get to learn more about Dennis that has trained for years under some great teachers and will be giving you insight on how that have helped him become a professional.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Harold Dennis

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Harold Dennis
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Harold Dennis
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Harold Dennis

Video.summary: Jacqueline Murphy Joins Rico No Suave for A Special Talk Show! You are in for a treat on the show as we have an awesome guest and Actor to bless us with inspiration on how she became an actor and producer and all of the great people she has met over time in her career and still blowing up!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Jacqueline Murphy

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Jacqueline Murphy
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Jacqueline Murphy
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Jacqueline Murphy

Video.summary: The Actor, Stuntman and Motion Capture Artist Chuck Johnson! Get to know Chuck Johnson tuning in from Tokyo, Japan, Learn about Martial Arts, Learn from Chuck about his passion of teaching people the art of wanting to be in a movie. You will learn alot in this interview!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chuck Johnson

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chuck Johnson
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chuck Johnson
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chuck Johnson

Video.summary: Prostate cancer is the most common cancer in men. But there is a great deal of misinformation about treatments, causes and even screening. Find out the truth from the expert in this program.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - The Truth About Prostate Cancer

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - The Truth About Prostate Cancer
Dr. Q&A - The Truth About Prostate Cancer
Dr. Q&A - The Truth About Prostate Cancer

Video.summary: Arthritis is the most common cause of hip problems but overuse and injury can also lead to pain, stiffness, and weakness. We ask an expert about what you can do to feel relief.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A- Arthritis and Pain Relief

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A- Arthritis and Pain Relief
Dr. Q&A- Arthritis and Pain Relief
Dr. Q&A- Arthritis and Pain Relief

Video.summary: We spend a third of our lives fast asleep, but it’s not always so easy to get there. We ask an expert about how you can get a good night’s rest.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A- Sleep

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A- Sleep
Dr. Q&A- Sleep
Dr. Q&A- Sleep

Video.summary: As humans, we are constantly struggling between the poles of what we think we want and what is. When we lose touch with the truth of what is, we create and compound our suffering. What narratives are you constructing? Are they in conflict with the truth of the situation? Are you struggling with what is?
Video.title: Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet

Image.alt: Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet
Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet
Intro to the Judge-Your-Neighbor Worksheet

Video.summary: The way you recall a memory and the way it actually happened might be completely different. The question is, do you know which version feeds you? We can become so wrapped up in our recollections, we convince ourselves of these untruths. Is that person a monster? Were they wishing you harm? Or were they dealing with a difficult situation in the best way they knew how?
Video.title: My Mother Terrifies Me

Image.alt: My Mother Terrifies Me
My Mother Terrifies Me
My Mother Terrifies Me

Video.summary: Stop focusing on the object of your desires and start focusing on the reason for desiring that object in the first place. When you turn it around, you may find that what you really want is completely different than what you’ve been telling yourself.
Video.title: I Want to Be Famous

Image.alt: I Want to Be Famous
I Want to Be Famous
I Want to Be Famous

Video.summary: A single thought plants the seed of a narrative. You feel lonely and unsupported, so, of course, someone must have abandoned you. Over time, the thought “I feel abandoned” grows into the story of an entire childhood. Let’s uproot the thought and untangle the story.
Video.title: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Image.alt: My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me
My Mom Didn't Fight for Me

Video.summary: Fear is a fickle partner. While it certainly serves a purpose — keeping us out of danger and forcing us to question our assumptions — if we give too much of ourselves over to fear, it will lead us down paths filled with insecurity, broken social interactions, and a persistent struggle against the way things actually are.
Video.title: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Image.alt: My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner
My Husband Doesn't Want Me as a Business Partner

Video.summary: Definitive statements are comforting. They give life structure and clear direction. But what happens when your declarations are at odds with your subconscious desires?
Video.title: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With

Image.alt: I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With
I Don't Trust I'll Find Someone to Create a Life With

Video.summary: Unsupersize Me documents the inspiring story of personal trainer Juan-Carlos Asse and his quest to prove that a whole foods, plant based diet coupled with an exercise regimen is capable of remarkably improving the health of any and every individual.
Video.title: Episode 1

Image.alt: Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1

Video.summary: Unsupersize Us follows director Juan-Carlos Asse takes five people from his hometown that suffer from common health issues and puts them on a regimen of a plant based diet and exercise, changing their lives forever.
Video.title: Episode 1

Image.alt: Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1
